mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_management
AND first_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{firstName}, '%')
AND last_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{lastName}, '%')
AND email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{email}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_management (user_name, user_key, password, first_name, last_name, email, address_line_1, address_line_2, city, state, post_code, country) VALUES (#{userName}, #{userKey}, #{password}, #{firstName}, #{lastName}, #{email}, #{addressLine1}, #{addressLine2}, #{city}, #{state}, #{postCode}, #{country})
